headline: Chevron (CVX) Stock Looks Fairly Valued Following Its 123% Five Year Run
summary: Chevron stock has delivered a strong 123.4% return over the past five years, yet current checks suggest it now looks closer to fairly valued than obviously cheap. The 123.4% five year return means long term holders have already seen a substantial payoff, which can limit how much of a discount new investors might reasonably expect today. Expectations around projects linked to higher oil prices and data center power demand can support the current share price. At the same time, geopolitical...

headline: Chevron Corporation (CVX) A Top Dividend Stock to Invest in According to Jim Simons’  Renaissance Technologies
summary: Chevron Corp (NYSE:CVX) is one of the best dividend stocks to invest in, according to Jim Simons’ Renaissance Technologies. On July 2, TD Cowen reiterated a Hold rating on Chevron Corp (NYSE:CVX) and cut the price target to $197 from $205. The price target cut aligns with adjusted targets in the oil major’s space ahead […]
